candidates.causal_theory: Sam_whitfield publicly commits to a referral target in a clinic-wide memo, making the drop visible to all staff. This creates social pressure on practice_manager_kim and referring_gp_alvarez to self-correct without direct inquiry or proposal requests, as their professional reputation is now tied to the metric.

No further action is required from anyone at this time; I trust that awareness alone will drive the necessary improvements.

Thank you for your dedication.
Sam Whitfield
